title: GitBook — fleet publication source (ecosystem-os local override)
purpose: ecosystem-os is the fleet GitBook source repo (see canon 06-gitbook: 'Pointer space to fleet GitBook source in ecosystem-os'). Unlike product repos that carry a thin publish mirror, this repo hosts the full authored GitBook space: chapter folders + PUBLISH.md guide. Local override of canon 06-gitbook extends files/allowlist and allowedChildFolders to the real fleet space.

PUBLISH.md.role: GitBook publish guide for the fleet space
